facts.statement: Mount Everest's South Base Camp is 5,000 meters above sea level
The nearest sea to Mount Everest is 1,000 km away
facts.actual: The Bay of Bengal is almost 700 km away

facts.statement: 100 climbers' bodies remain on Mount Everest
facts.actual: Over 200 bodies remain on the mountain

facts.statement: Mount Everest was first summited in 1950
facts.actual: Mount Everest was first summited in 1953 by Sir Edmund Hillary and Tenzing Norgay
